message:
test(conformance,cve_arena,runtime_math): add fault injection scenarios, CVE corpus index, and update test fixtures

Add fault injection scenario catalog, CVE arena corpus index, and update
conformance proof obligations/traceability, runtime math admission gate
and controller reports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,257 @@
+schema_version: v1
+manifest_id: bd-3fil-franken-fault-catalog
+generated_utc: "2026-04-06T00:00:00Z"
+description: >
+  Reusable declarative fault-injection catalog for franken_fault and future
+  FrankenLab scenario runners. The catalog mixes real membrane-backed memory
+  probes with deterministic model scenarios for time and concurrency failures.
+scenarios:
+  - id: memory.use_after_free
+    label: use_after_free
+    domain: memory
+    target: membrane_ptr_validator
+    operation: use_after_free
+    description: Deterministic temporal-safety probe against the membrane validator.
+    api_family: pointer_validation
+    symbol: membrane::ptr_validator::validate
+    strict:
+      detected: true
+      classification: TemporalViolation
+      decision_path: TemporalViolation
+      healing_action: None
+      errno: 14
+    hardened:
+      detected: true
+      classification: TemporalViolation
+      decision_path: Repair
+      healing_action: ReturnSafeDefault
+      errno: 14
+    variants:
+      - id: delay_0_size_32
+        params:
+          size: 32
+          delay: 0
+      - id: delay_64_size_128
+        params:
+          size: 128
+          delay: 64
+      - id: delay_1024_size_256
+        params:
+          size: 256
+          delay: 1024
+  - id: memory.double_free
+    label: double_free
+    domain: memory
+    target: membrane_ptr_validator
+    operation: double_free
+    description: Deterministic double-free probe through the membrane allocator path.
+    api_family: malloc
+    symbol: free
+    strict:
+      detected: true
+      classification: DoubleFree
+      decision_path: Deny
+      healing_action: None
+      errno: 14
+    hardened:
+      detected: true
+      classification: DoubleFree
+      decision_path: Repair
+      healing_action: IgnoreDoubleFree
+      errno: 14
+    variants:
+      - id: delay_0
+        params:
+          size: 64
+          delay: 0
+      - id: delay_8
+        params:
+          size: 96
+          delay: 8
+      - id: delay_128
+        params:
+          size: 192
+          delay: 128
+  - id: memory.off_by_one
+    label: off_by_one
+    domain: memory
+    target: membrane_ptr_validator
+    operation: off_by_one
+    description: Trailing-canary corruption injection without harness-side unsafe code.
+    api_family: string
+    symbol: memcpy
+    strict:
+      detected: true
+      classification: FreedWithCanaryCorruption
+      decision_path: Deny
+      healing_action: None
+      errno: 14
+    hardened:
+      detected: true
+      classification: FreedWithCanaryCorruption
+      decision_path: Repair
+      healing_action: TruncateWithNull
+      errno: 14
+    variants:
+      - id: size_16
+        params:
+          size: 16
+      - id: size_64
+        params:
+          size: 64
+      - id: size_257
+        params:
+          size: 257
+  - id: memory.oom_budget
+    label: oom_budget
+    domain: memory
+    target: memory_budget
+    operation: oom
+    description: Deterministic OOM injection model for allocator-budget exhaustion.
+    api_family: malloc
+    symbol: malloc
+    strict:
+      detected: true
+      classification: OutOfMemoryInjected
+      decision_path: Deny
+      healing_action: None
+      errno: 12
+    hardened:
+      detected: true
+      classification: OutOfMemoryInjected
+      decision_path: Repair
+      healing_action: ReturnSafeDefault
+      errno: 12
+    variants:
+      - id: immediate_oom
+        params:
+          budget_bytes: 64
+          reserve_bytes: 0
+          requested_bytes: 256
+      - id: exhausted_after_reserve
+        params:
+          budget_bytes: 128
+          reserve_bytes: 112
+          requested_bytes: 32
+  - id: time.virtual_drift
+    label: virtual_drift
+    domain: time
+    target: virtual_clock
+    operation: virtual_drift
+    description: Virtual-time drift detection for deadline-sensitive control paths.
+    api_family: time
+    symbol: clock_gettime
+    strict:
+      detected: true
+      classification: ClockDriftExceeded
+      decision_path: Deny
+      healing_action: None
+      errno: 34
+    hardened:
+      detected: true
+      classification: ClockDriftExceeded
+      decision_path: Repair
+      healing_action: ReturnSafeDefault
+      errno: 34
+    variants:
+      - id: forward_drift
+        params:
+          base_ns: 1000000
+          drift_ns: 90000
+          max_drift_ns: 25000
+      - id: backward_drift
+        params:
+          base_ns: 1000000
+          drift_ns: -120000
+          max_drift_ns: 25000
+  - id: concurrency.aba_hazard
+    label: aba_hazard
+    domain: concurrency
+    target: deterministic_scheduler
+    operation: aba_hazard
+    description: Generation-reuse fault model for ABA hazard detection.
+    api_family: pthread
+    symbol: pthread_mutex_lock
+    strict:
+      detected: true
+      classification: AbaHazard
+      decision_path: Deny
+      healing_action: None
+      errno: 11
+    hardened:
+      detected: true
+      classification: AbaHazard
+      decision_path: Repair
+      healing_action: UpgradeToSafeVariant
+      errno: 11
+    variants:
+      - id: generation_reused
+        params:
+          initial_generation: 41
+          recycled_generation: 41
+      - id: high_contention_reuse
+        params:
+          initial_generation: 4096
+          recycled_generation: 4096
+  - id: concurrency.starvation_budget
+    label: starvation_budget
+    domain: concurrency
+    target: deterministic_scheduler
+    operation: starvation_budget
+    description: Fairness-budget probe for starvation under deterministic scheduling.
+    api_family: pthread
+    symbol: pthread_mutex_lock
+    strict:
+      detected: true
+      classification: StarvationDetected
+      decision_path: Deny
+      healing_action: None
+      errno: 11
+    hardened:
+      detected: true
+      classification: StarvationDetected
+      decision_path: Repair
+      healing_action: UpgradeToSafeVariant
+      errno: 11
+    variants:
+      - id: eight_waiters
+        params:
+          waiters: 8
+          max_skips: 3
+          grants: [0, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0]
+      - id: sixteen_waiters
+        params:
+          waiters: 16
+          max_skips: 4
+          grants: [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0]
+  - id: concurrency.cancellation_window
+    label: cancellation_window
+    domain: concurrency
+    target: deterministic_scheduler
+    operation: cancellation_window
+    description: Worst-point cancellation injection for critical sections.
+    api_family: pthread
+    symbol: pthread_cancel
+    strict:
+      detected: true
+      classification: CancellationAtWorstPoint
+      decision_path: Deny
+      healing_action: None
+      errno: 4
+    hardened:
+      detected: true
+      classification: CancellationAtWorstPoint
+      decision_path: Repair
+      healing_action: ReturnSafeDefault
+      errno: 4
+    variants:
+      - id: cancel_inside_critical
+        params:
+          cancel_at: critical
+          worst_point: critical
+          phase_count: 3
+      - id: cancel_before_commit
+        params:
+          cancel_at: commit
+          worst_point: commit
+          phase_count: 4

@@ -57,6 +57,10 @@

     },

+    },
     "mode": {
       "type": "string",
       "enum": ["strict", "hardened"],
@@ -70,6 +74,10 @@

+    },

       "type": "string",
       "description": "Optional span id for multi-component traces under one trace_id"

       "gates": ["scripts/conformance_golden_gate.sh", "scripts/check_proof_binder.sh"],
-      "join_keys": ["mode=strict", "gate=conformance_golden", "gate=proof_binder", "bead=bd-249m.1"],

       "source_refs": [
         "crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/config.rs:99",
         "crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/ptr_validator.rs:1197",

+{
+  "schema_version": "1.0",

+    ],
+    "expected_stock_schema": {
+      "crashes": "boolean — whether stock glibc crashes",
+      "signal": "string|null — signal name if crashes (SIGSEGV, SIGABRT, etc.)",
+      "exit_code": "integer|null — expected exit code if no crash",
+      "description": "string — human-readable description of stock behavior"
+    },
+    "expected_tsm_schema": {
+      "crashes": "boolean — whether FrankenLibC TSM prevents the crash",
+      "exit_code": "integer — expected exit code under TSM",
+      "healing_actions": "string[] — TSM healing actions applied (ClampSize, TruncateWithNull, etc.)",
+      "description": "string — human-readable description of TSM behavior"
+    },
+    "vulnerability_classes": [
+      "heap-buffer-overflow",
+      "stack-buffer-overflow",
+      "use-after-free",
+      "double-free",
+      "null-pointer-deref",
+      "integer-overflow",
+      "format-string",
+      "memory-corruption",
+      "cache-poisoning"
+    ],
+    "tsm_feature_vocabulary": [
+      "canary",
+      "bounds_checking",
+      "clamp_size",
+      "truncate_with_null",
+      "return_safe_default",
+      "quarantine",
+      "generational_arena",
+      "ignore_double_free",
+      "ignore_foreign_free",
+      "realloc_as_malloc",
+      "upgrade_to_safe_variant",
+      "allocation_fingerprints",
+      "bloom_filter",
+      "page_oracle"
+    ]
+  },
+  "scenarios": [
+    {
+      "cve_id": "CVE-2023-6246",
+      "test_name": "syslog_heap_overflow_suite",
+      "directory": "glibc/cve_2023_6246_syslog_suite",
+      "category": "glibc-internal",
+      "vulnerability_class": "heap-buffer-overflow",
+      "cwe_ids": ["CWE-787", "CWE-131", "CWE-190"],
+      "cvss_score": 8.4,
+      "description": "__vsyslog_internal heap overflow via crafted ident/format string causing integer overflow in buffer size calculation",
+      "affected_component": "syslog",
+      "trigger_file": "trigger.c",
+      "build_cmd": "cc -o trigger trigger.c -Wall -Wextra",
+      "run_cmd": "./trigger",
+      "expected_stock": {
+        "crashes": true,
+        "signal": "SIGSEGV",
+        "description": "Heap corruption from integer overflow in buffer size calculation; controlled heap overwrite enables local privilege escalation"
+      },
+      "expected_tsm": {
+        "crashes": false,
+        "exit_code": 0,
+        "healing_actions": ["ClampSize", "TruncateWithNull"],
+        "description": "TSM detects overflow via trailing canary and clamps the buffer size; truncation prevents the overwrite"
+      },
+      "tsm_features_tested": ["canary", "bounds_checking", "clamp_size", "truncate_with_null"],
+      "replay_deterministic": true,
+      "timeout_seconds": 5
+    },
+    {
+      "cve_id": "CVE-2024-2961",
+      "test_name": "iconv_iso2022cn_ext_buffer_overflow",
+      "directory": "glibc/cve_2024_2961_iconv",
+      "category": "glibc-internal",
+      "vulnerability_class": "heap-buffer-overflow",
+      "cwe_ids": ["CWE-787"],
+      "cvss_score": 8.8,
+      "description": "iconv() writes up to 8 bytes past the output buffer when converting to ISO-2022-CN-EXT due to incorrect bounds computation in the internal encoder",
+      "affected_component": "iconv",
+      "trigger_file": "trigger.c",
+      "build_cmd": "cc -o trigger trigger.c -Wall -Wextra",
+      "run_cmd": "./trigger",
+      "expected_stock": {
+        "crashes": true,
+        "signal": "SIGSEGV",
+        "description": "Heap corruption from 8-byte overwrite past output buffer; may crash at free() or silently corrupt adjacent allocations enabling code execution"
+      },
+      "expected_tsm": {
+        "crashes": false,
+        "exit_code": 0,
+        "healing_actions": ["ClampSize"],
+        "description": "Trailing canary detects overflow at free(); ClampSize would prevent the overwrite in iconv internal memcpy; bounds computation catches the out-of-range write"
+      },
+      "tsm_features_tested": ["canary", "bounds_checking", "clamp_size"],
+      "replay_deterministic": true,
+      "timeout_seconds": 5
+    },
+    {
+      "cve_id": "CVE-2024-33599",
+      "test_name": "nscd_netgroup_cache_memory_corruption_suite",
+      "directory": "glibc/cve_2024_33599_nscd_suite",
+      "category": "glibc-internal",
+      "vulnerability_class": "memory-corruption",
+      "cwe_ids": ["CWE-121", "CWE-476", "CWE-787", "CWE-908"],
+      "cvss_score": 7.6,
+      "description": "nscd netgroup cache corruption via stack overflow and null pointer dereference; multiple memory safety violations in netgroup response handling",
+      "affected_component": "nscd",
+      "trigger_file": "trigger.c",
+      "build_cmd": "cc -o trigger trigger.c -Wall -Wextra",
+      "run_cmd": "./trigger",
+      "expected_stock": {
+        "crashes": true,
+        "signal": "SIGSEGV",
+        "description": "Stack overflow from recursive netgroup expansion; null pointer dereference in cache lookup; heap corruption from incorrect size calculations"
+      },
+      "expected_tsm": {
+        "crashes": false,
+        "exit_code": 0,
+        "healing_actions": ["ClampSize", "ReturnSafeDefault"],
+        "description": "TSM detects stack overflow via canary, clamps recursive depth, returns safe default for missing cache entries, and quarantines corrupted allocations"
+      },
+      "tsm_features_tested": ["canary", "bounds_checking", "clamp_size", "return_safe_default", "quarantine"],
+      "replay_deterministic": true,
+      "timeout_seconds": 10
+    },
+    {
+      "cve_id": "CVE-2025-8058",
+      "test_name": "regcomp_double_free_on_alloc_failure",
+      "directory": "glibc/cve_2025_8058_regcomp",
+      "category": "glibc-internal",
+      "vulnerability_class": "double-free",
+      "cwe_ids": ["CWE-415"],
+      "cvss_score": 5.5,
+      "description": "regcomp() double-frees internal regex parse tree nodes when malloc fails during compilation of a complex regex, due to incorrect error-path cleanup",
+      "affected_component": "regex",
+      "trigger_file": "trigger.c",
+      "build_cmd": "cc -o trigger trigger.c -Wall -Wextra",
+      "run_cmd": "./trigger",
+      "expected_stock": {
+        "crashes": true,
+        "signal": "SIGABRT",
+        "description": "Double free detected by glibc allocator; aborts with 'double free or corruption' message"
+      },
+      "expected_tsm": {
+        "crashes": false,
+        "exit_code": 0,
+        "healing_actions": ["IgnoreDoubleFree"],
+        "description": "Generational arena detects the double-free via generation counter mismatch; IgnoreDoubleFree healing action silently discards the second free; quarantine prevents the freed memory from being reused during the vulnerable window"
+      },
+      "tsm_features_tested": ["generational_arena", "quarantine", "ignore_double_free", "allocation_fingerprints"],
+      "replay_deterministic": true,
+      "timeout_seconds": 5
+    }
+  ],
+  "corpus_summary": {
+    "total_scenarios": 4,
+    "vulnerability_classes": {
+      "heap-buffer-overflow": 2,
+      "memory-corruption": 1,
